family=vevo2
variant=default
model_root=/models/vevo2
description=VeVo2 speech and singing model
  Supported tasks:
    --task tts --mode offline
    --task vc --mode offline
    --task svc --mode offline
  Available input options:
    --text <text>
    --source-audio <wav>
    --target-voice <wav>
  Model request options:
    --task-route <route>  VeVo2 route: zero_shot_tts or style_preserved_vc
    --use-pitch-shift <true|false>  Pitch-align source references
  Model session options:
    --session-option vevo2.weight_type <type>  Weight storage type
    --session-option vevo2.vocoder_weight_type <type>  Vocoder weight storage type
  Model load options:
    --load-option vevo2.whisper_model_path <dir>  Local Whisper model directory
  Common output options:
    --out <wav>
